basic_details.job_title: DLSA Sitapur Stenographer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: District Legal Services Authority Sitapur (DLSA Sitapur)
basic_details.short_information: District Legal Services Authority Sitapur (DLSA Sitapur) Stenographer Notification 2026 has been released on 29 May 2026 on the official website. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the DLSA Sitapur Stenographer Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Retired as Stenographer from District Court or Collectorate Court
qualification.details: Retired as Stenographer from District Court or Collectorate Court.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 30-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download DLSA Sitapur Stenographer Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download DLSA Sitapur Stenographer Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the DLSA Sitapur Stenographer Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the Stenographer post is 30th June 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the eligibility criteria for the Stenographer post?
faq.answer: To be eligible for the Stenographer post, candidates must have retired as a Stenographer from either a District Court or a Collectorate Court. This is the primary qualification required.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Stenographer post is 65 years. There is no minimum age specified, but the candidate must have retired from their previous position.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Stenographer position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Stenographer post will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 9000 per month. This is a contractual position.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Stenographer post?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the Stenographer post in the District Legal Services Authority Sitapur (DLSA Sitapur) recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is strictly offline. Candidates need to download the application form and submit it via post or as instructed in the notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Stenographer role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Stenographer post involves two main stages: Application Scrutiny and Document Verification. Candidates will be shortlisted based on these steps.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee required for any category of candidates (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q9. What documents are required to be attached with the application form?
faq.answer: Candidates need to attach self-attested copies of required documents, including a photograph, signature, ID proof, and relevant certificates as mentioned in the official notification.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can typically be downloaded from the official website of DLSA Sitapur or the relevant government job portal. The links are provided in the 'Important Links' section of this article.
